creator: dch@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 173453
poudriere.log

# issue

on a base "normal openssl" configured system, letskencrypt builds cleanly from /usr/ports/security/letskencrypt. The same checkout fails to build via poudriere:

needs LibreSSL to build. set DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=ssl=libressl and rebuild all ports that depend on openssl


# logs

see attachment for failure log.


BTW I am usually on efnet #bsdports as dch.
